document_title: FaultKey Engine Brief — Deterministic AI-Liability Attribution

commitment.canonical_form: raw bytes of the PDF artifact identified by artifact.sha256

notes: This anchor pins the methodology document that every CausalCertificateV1 issued under engine versions faultkey-deterministic-v1 / calb2-v0.7 cites by version + hash.
Any change to the methodology requires a new version (e.g. 1.0.1) and a new anchor entry; the previous version remains pinned and verifiable indefinitely.
The PDF is hosted at the public_url above. Anyone re-downloading that URL can recompute sha256 and compare against artifact.sha256 to confirm byte-identity with this anchor.
